cmd/jobs/billing.purpose: Cobra parent command that aggregates four billing sub-commands (advance, advancecharges, collect, subscriptionsync) under a single 'billing' namespace. Acts as a pure aggregator — contains no business logic itself.

patterns.name: Aggregator-only parent command
patterns.description: billing.go registers sub-commands in init() and exposes a single Cmd var. No RunE, no flags, no logic.

patterns.name: Each sub-command lives in its own sub-package
patterns.description: advance, advancecharges, collect, subscriptionsync are separate packages imported and registered in billing.go's init().

patterns.name: internal.App singleton for service access
patterns.description: All sub-commands access billing services exclusively through internal.App fields (BillingAutoAdvancer, ChargesAutoAdvancer, BillingSubscriptionReconciler) — never construct services locally.

patterns.name: cmd.Context() for context propagation
patterns.description: Every RunE uses cmd.Context() — never context.Background() or context.TODO().

patterns.name: Nil guard for optional features
patterns.description: advancecharges guards every execution path against app.ChargesAutoAdvancer == nil because charges are optional.
patterns.example: if app.ChargesAutoAdvancer == nil { return errors.New("charges feature disabled") }

patterns.name: PersistentFlags on parent Cmd for shared filters
patterns.description: --namespace and similar shared flags belong on the parent (billing) Cmd or on the sub-command that owns them, never duplicated across siblings.

key_file_guides.role: Registers the four sub-commands in init(); exposes Cmd for the parent jobs command to mount.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Never add RunE or flags here — this is a pure aggregator.

key_file_guides.role: List, advance single, advance-all sub-commands via BillingAutoAdvancer.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Uses nil slice for optional namespace filter — don't default to empty string.

key_file_guides.role: Charge advance sub-commands; nil-guards ChargesAutoAdvancer before every call.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Omitting the nil guard causes a panic when the charges feature is disabled.

key_file_guides.role: Invoice collection sub-commands using billingworkercollect structured input types.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Always supply time.Now() for CollectionAt — passing nil is a known debt in InvoiceCmd, do not replicate.

key_file_guides.role: Subscription-to-invoice sync reconciliation sub-commands via BillingSubscriptionReconciler.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Always apply lookback filter; omitting it scans all historical subscriptions.

anti_patterns: Constructing billing or charges service instances locally instead of using internal.App fields
Using context.Background() or context.TODO() instead of cmd.Context()
Registering sub-command-specific flags on the billing parent Cmd (causes flag pollution across siblings)
Hardcoding namespace strings instead of accepting them via --namespace flag
Omitting the nil guard on ChargesAutoAdvancer — panics when charges feature is disabled

decisions.decision: billing.go is a pure aggregator with no logic
decisions.rationale: Keeps sub-command concerns isolated; billing.go only wires them together so each can evolve independently.

decisions.decision: All service access goes through internal.App
decisions.rationale: Prevents duplicate wiring and ensures the same Wire-provisioned instances (with correct feature flags) are used in all sub-commands.

cmd/jobs/ledger.purpose: Cobra parent command grouping ledger administrative sub-commands (currently only backfillaccounts). Owns the ledger namespace in the jobs CLI and coordinates sub-packages that bypass DI to access concrete ledger adapters when credits.enabled=false would otherwise produce noops.

patterns.name: Aggregator-only parent command
patterns.description: ledger.go registers sub-commands in init() and exposes Cmd — no RunE, no flags, no logic.

patterns.name: Bypass DI for concrete ledger stack
patterns.description: Sub-commands build concrete ledger adapters directly (not via app/common Wire outputs) because the Wire-provided resolver is a noop when credits.enabled=false.

patterns.name: Flags defined in init(), logic in RunE
patterns.description: All flag bindings go in init(); RunE contains all execution logic including time flag parsing.

patterns.name: RFC3339 time parsing for flag values
patterns.description: Time-valued flags are parsed from RFC3339 strings inside RunE, normalized to UTC.
patterns.example: t, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, flagVal); t = t.UTC()

patterns.name: Print summary before returning error
patterns.description: Backfill commands print a summary of processed/failed counts before returning any error so partial results remain visible.

patterns.name: Interface-driven service in separate service package
patterns.description: Backfill orchestration logic lives in a separate service sub-package (not in the Cobra command file) with interface-driven dependencies to allow unit testing.

patterns.name: Cursor pagination with MAX_SAFE_ITER guard
patterns.description: All paginated loops in the service package use paginationv2.Cursor and enforce the MAX_SAFE_ITER limit to prevent infinite loops on large datasets.
patterns.example: for iter := 0; cursor != nil && iter < paginationv2.MAX_SAFE_ITER; iter++ { ... }

key_file_guides.role: Pure aggregator — registers backfillaccounts.Cmd in init(), exposes Cmd for the parent jobs command.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Never add RunE, flags, or business logic to ledger.go.

key_file_guides.role: Cobra command file: flag binding in init(), concrete adapter construction and RunE execution.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must build lockr.NewLocker — accountservice requires it for CreateCustomerAccounts. Do not use the Wire-provided ledger resolver (it is noop when credits.enabled=false).

key_file_guides.role: Pure Go backfill orchestration with no Cobra or Ent imports; interface-driven for unit testability.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Use ValidationIssue error codes to detect missing-account condition — not nil checks. DryRun must only increment WouldProvision, never write.

key_file_guides.role: Ent-backed implementation of the CustomerLister interface used by the service.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must use cursor pagination — not offset — to handle large customer sets safely.

key_file_guides.role: Unit tests for the backfill service using mock/fake implementations.

anti_patterns: Using the Wire-provided ledger account resolver from app/common — it is noop when credits.enabled=false
Omitting lockr.NewLocker when constructing the account service — causes a panic at CreateCustomerAccounts
Using offset pagination instead of cursor pagination in large customer loops
Returning an error from RunE before calling printSummary — partial results become invisible
Importing *entdb.Client directly in service.go — breaks unit testability

decisions.decision: Build concrete ledger adapters directly instead of using DI outputs
decisions.rationale: app/common wires ledger services to noops when credits.enabled=false; backfill jobs genuinely need real ledger writes, so they must construct the concrete stack themselves.

decisions.decision: Separate service package from Cobra command
decisions.rationale: Isolates orchestration logic from CLI plumbing, enabling unit tests that do not require a real database or Cobra context.

decisions.decision: Detect missing-account condition via ValidationIssue error codes, not nil checks
decisions.rationale: Ledger adapters return typed ValidationIssue errors for missing accounts; nil-checking Get results is unreliable and breaks idempotency.

code_examples.scenario: Adding a new ledger sub-command that requires concrete adapter construction
